title: MOSSEL BAY FIRE UPDATE: Gift of the Givers supports Mossel Bay fire response
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Firefighters and all...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Firefighters and all relevant role players will continue to monitor a flare-up fire in Aalwyndal throughout the night, as strong, shifting winds persist in the area. (22:10)","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Firefighters and all relevant role players will continue to monitor a flare-up fire in Aalwyndal throughout the night, as strong, shifting winds persist in the area. (22:10)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The challenging conditions continue to hamper firefighting efforts in Aalwyndal and surrounding areas, where flare-ups remain a concern.","html":"The challenging conditions continue to hamper firefighting efforts in Aalwyndal and surrounding areas, where flare-ups remain a concern."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Meanwhile Gift of the Givers teams are actively responding to the Mossel Bay fires as part of the Joint Operations Centre, working alongside municipal authorities, Fire and Rescue Services, SAPS, EMS, the NSRI and Disaster Management.","html":"Meanwhile Gift of the Givers teams are actively responding to the Mossel Bay fires as part of the Joint Operations Centre, working alongside municipal authorities, Fire and Rescue Services, SAPS, EMS, the NSRI and Disaster Management."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Relief and support operations continue around the clock as teams coordinate assistance for communities affected by the fire.","html":"Relief and support operations continue around the clock as teams coordinate assistance for communities affected by the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow the Mossel Bay Advertiser news team on Facebook, X, Instagram, TikTok and www.mosselbayadvertiser.com for the latest updates on the fire.","html":"Follow the Mossel Bay Advertiser news team on Facebook, X, Instagram, TikTok and www.mosselbayadvertiser.com for the latest updates on the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To contribute visit:","html":"To contribute visit:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":": http://www.giftofthegivers.org/make-a-difference","html":" : http://www.giftofthegivers.org/make-a-difference"},{"type":"paragraph","text":": 0800 786 911","html":" : 0800 786 911"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequ, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequ, Karoo news’"}]
